title: Exposure of Sensitive Data due to Missing Access Controls
description: Without defined access controls and data classification, sensitive data could be exposed to unauthorized users or systems. This could occur if data is stored without proper encryption or if users have excessive permissions.
attack_vector: Unauthorized access to sensitive data due to insufficient access controls, weak encryption, or misconfigured permissions.
mitigations: Implement strict access controls based on the principle of least privilege.
Encrypt sensitive data at rest and in transit.
Regularly review and update access permissions to ensure they remain appropriate.
